mapper.insert:
insert into exam_assignment_question (assignment_id, question_id, question_order, points) values
(#{item.assignmentId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionOrder}, #{item.points})

insert into exam_assignment_question (assignment_id, question_id, question_order, points) values
(#{item.assignmentId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionOrder}, #{item.points})
mapper.delete: delete from exam_assignment_question where assignment_id = #{assignmentId} and question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: select question_id from exam_assignment_question where assignment_id = #{assignmentId} order by question_order

select q.question_id, q.question_type_id, q.question_content, q.options, q.correct_answer, q.explanation, q.difficulty, q.course_id, q.teacher_id, q.status, q.del_flag, q.create_time, q.update_time, t.type_name, c.course_name, u.username as teacher_name, aq.question_order, aq.points from exam_assignment_question aq inner join exam_question_bank q on aq.question_id = q.question_id left join exam_question_type t on q.question_type_id = t.type_id left join edu_course c on q.course_id = c.course_id left join edu_teacher e on q.teacher_id = e.teacher_id left join sys_user u on e.user_id = u.user_id where aq.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} and q.del_flag = 0 order by aq.question_order
